name: Red Bus Pickup School Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Riverview/Hillsborough County FL area; serves schools plus airport/cruise/group event transport; no confirmed district contracts
recent_news: Active small family-owned operator in Riverview FL; markets franchise opportunities on website (per website content)
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-location FL operator (~$0.8M rev, 18 employees). Mixed school/airport/cruise model is not a clean yellow-bus contract base; unlikely tuck-in priority unless aggregated.

name: Long Island City Bus Devmnt Co
owner_or_parent: Long Island City Partnership (501c3 BID/neighborhood development organization)
districts_or_customers: Not a school-bus operator; this record is the Long Island City Partnership / LIC Business Improvement District, a neighborhood economic development non-profit at 27-01 Queens Plaza N
recent_news: Misclassified record. Elizabeth Lusskin departed LIC Partnership in May 2022 for Empire State Development. LIC Partnership is a BID/development org, not a transportation contractor.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET. Record is the Long Island City Partnership/BID (neighborhood development non-profit), not a school-bus operator. Exclude from pipeline.

name: America's Best Transportation
districts_or_customers: Northeast Ohio / Cleveland area; serves special needs student population (school routes plus NEMT under NPI 1144474123 registered as non-emergency medical transport - van)
recent_news: Active family-run special needs transportation provider; positions itself as becoming 'the best special needs transportation provider in Northeast Ohio'
fit_notes: Family-owned Cleveland special-needs/SPED van operator (~$2M rev, 27 employees). Husband-and-wife management (Arthur and Zorida Jarvis) is a classic succession-candidate profile. Small but on-thesis for Summit's special-needs tuck-in strategy in OH (in-state). Worth a soft outreach.

name: My Medical Transporter LLC
districts_or_customers: Marietta/Cobb County GA area; Georgia Medicaid NEMT broker region (Verida/MTM); no school district contracts confirmed
recent_news: Limited public footprint - only a Yelp listing surfaces; website (mymedicaltransporter.com) is non-responsive (connection refused), suggesting site is down or business may be inactive
fit_notes: Appears to be NEMT-only (Medicaid van service), not student transportation. Off-thesis for Summit unless they hold SPED routes (none confirmed). Likely deprioritize; possibly defunct given dead website.

name: T G Transportation
districts_or_customers: Jacksonville FL area; NEMT business per owner LinkedIn; no confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: Owner Nicole Willie-Addison (BA Education, Southern Illinois) listed on LinkedIn as Owner/President of T.G. Transportation, Jacksonville FL. Website tgtransportation.com is parked/for sale via Afternic, suggesting digital presence is dormant. (Note: a separate 'TG Transportation LLC' USDOT 3966743 is an Oregon freight carrier - different entity.)
fit_notes: Small Jacksonville NEMT/special-needs van operator under sole female owner. Parked website is a soft red flag (could be operational but low-tech, or winding down). Off-thesis if pure NEMT; worth a quick LinkedIn outreach to confirm any SPED/school district book before deprioritizing.
